planSteps.description: Navigate to the AI Mind Map homepage
Scroll down to the 'Live Demo' or 'Codebase Has a Brain' interactive knowledge graph section
Verify the graph canvas SVG is visible and the stats bar shows '120 nodes' and '300 edges'
Click the 'Types' tab in the left panel
Verify the left panel now shows a list of node type categories such as 'class', 'method', and 'function' each with a count number next to them
Click the '🔥 Hot' tab in the left panel
Verify the left panel shows a ranked list of the most-connected nodes with degree counts visible next to each entry
Click the '🔥 Hotspots' control button above the graph area
Verify the graph updates so that the most-connected nodes appear highlighted or enlarged while less-connected nodes appear dimmed, confirming the hotspot filter is active
